title: emilia sonchifolia var. sonchifolia
intro: Emilia sonchifolia var. sonchifolia, also known as baisha jianghuang or yellow flower, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Emilia sonchifolia var. sonchifolia include its ability to improve circulation, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of digestive disorders. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking, particularly in soups and stews.
